title: More Spell Attributes [More Magic Series]
description: More Spell Attributes and relative enchantments for your favorite spell caster
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Spell Power Attributes
# 💎 Features
### Spell Schools
 

This library introduces new Spell Schools for Spell Power Attributes, the list is:

- 🩸 Blood
- 🟢 Corruption
- 🍃 Nature
- 🎵 Sound
- 💧 Water
- 💨 Wind

### Particles:

Various particles usefull for spell and such

### Enchants:


This library also introduces releted spell power Enchants, the list is:

- Spell Channeling - Increase Spell damege of the spell schools that the mod introduces 
- Viscosity - Increase Blood and Water Spell Power 
- Fertility - Increase Corruption and Nature Spell Power
- Volatility - Increase Sound and Wind Spell Power
# 🔧 Configuration
**Enchants bonuses:**
- config/more_spell_attributes/enchants
